'''"Lips" Meyer''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Gran/Legends|Gran]] criminal and resident of [[Outland Transit Station]] wanted by the members of Outland Station Sanitary Service Union 233-34 for informing on them in exchange for credits and immunity for his past crimes. In [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], the bounties posted on him were 2,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] alive and 1,000 dead. He was captured by [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]] for 2,000 credits while working as a hired gun for [[Meeko Ghintee]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter]]'' {{1st}}
